description: Detects race condition risks in Java: unsynchronized shared collection fields (HashMap, ArrayList, etc.) in classes with threading constructs. JSON version matches all field_declaration nodes (cannot filter by type name or check for concurrent context without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Generic field declaration detected -- verify this is not an unsynchronized collection (HashMap, ArrayList, etc.) shared across threads; use ConcurrentHashMap or Collections.synchronizedMap()
